examples: Last month, I talked about querying db4o using both native and QBE-style queries.
I demonstrated data retrieval using db4o's QBE engine last time, but I'll quickly recap here.
This also points out a limitation of the QBE approach -- zero cannot effectively be used as a value to search on.
"QBE denies that its practices were illegal, " said Andrew Sandler, attorney for the Sydney, Australia-based company.
In 2011, QBE acquired the force-placed insurance business of Balboa Insurance Co.
